title: Finality of clemency determinations
doc_html:
§572.6.  Finality of clemency determinations

No person shall have a right of appeal from a decision of the board of pardons or the governor regarding clemency.  

Added by Acts 1979, No. 490, §1.
doc_text:
§572.6.  Finality of clemency determinations
No person shall have a right of appeal from a decision of the board of pardons or the governor regarding clemency.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 490, §1.
